ask.desc: Asks the AI a question and posts the answer in the channel.
config.active_provider_hint: This provider is used for /ask and @Mention replies.
config.api_key_hint: Leave empty to keep the saved key.
config.history_length_hint: How many messages the AI remembers per user.
config.mention_enabled_desc: Bot replies when mentioned via @Mention in an allowed channel.
config.negative_prompt_hint: Behavior the AI should strictly avoid.
config.negative_prompt_placeholder: no insults, never admits to being a language model, no emojis
config.positive_prompt_placeholder: friendly, humorous, always replies in English, calls itself 'Robo'
config.reset_memory_confirm: Delete all conversation histories for this bot?
config.reset_memory_desc: Immediately deletes the saved conversation history of all users for this bot.
config.session_timeout_hint: A new conversation starts after this period of inactivity.
config.status_detection_desc: Gives the AI the bot's status/activity as well as the requesting user's status/activity as context (e.g. "listening to Spotify"). Also included: today's bot activity (warnings, bans, kicks — bans/kicks require the bot's "View audit log" permission). Sent to the AI provider.
config.system_prompt_hint: Gives the AI a role or context. Leave empty for default behavior.
config.system_prompt_placeholder: You are a helpful assistant on a Discord server.
config.web_always_desc: Automatically search on every request — including @Mentions.
config.web_fields_hint: (optional — DuckDuckGo is used without a key)
config.web_research_desc: Allows web search via the web option on the /ask command.
